description: Routes queries to models based on detected difficulty and accuracy thresholds

Bin 0 (Easy).rationale: Accuracy meets fast-tier threshold; using cheapest/fastest option

Bin 1 (Medium).rationale: Accuracy meets fast-tier threshold; using cheapest/fastest option

Bin 2 (Hard).rationale: Accuracy meets fast-tier threshold; using cheapest/fastest option

Bin 3 (Very Hard).rationale: Accuracy meets fast-tier threshold; using cheapest/fastest option

Bin 4 (Hardest).rationale: Accuracy meets fast-tier threshold; using cheapest/fastest option
